user_query: I want to surprise my friends with a unique vacation. Can you provide me with the trending search keywords in Brazil and Argentina for the month of September? Additionally, recommend some hotels in these countries for our stay.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the trending search keywords for Brazil in September.
Retrieve the trending search keywords for Argentina in September.
Based on trending keywords in Brazil, recommend hotels suitable for the vacation.
Based on trending keywords in Argentina, recommend hotels suitable for the vacation.
